mapper.select: SELECT BODY_CODE AS bodyCode, ARM_LENGTH_TYPE AS armLengthType, HAND_TYPE AS handType FROM USER_BODY_PROFILE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_SWING_VIDEO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SWING_VIDEO ( VIDEO_ID, USER_ID, VIDEO_URL, VIDEO_TYPE, CLUB_TYPE, ORIGINAL_FILENAME, UPDATED_AT, UPLOADED_AT ) VALUES ( #{frontVideoId}, #{userId}, #{frontVideoUrl}, 'FRONT', #{clubType}, 'front_result.mp4', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

SELECT SEQ_SWING_VIDEO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SWING_VIDEO ( VIDEO_ID, USER_ID, VIDEO_URL, VIDEO_TYPE, CLUB_TYPE, ORIGINAL_FILENAME, UPDATED_AT, UPLOADED_AT ) VALUES ( #{sideVideoId}, #{userId}, #{sideVideoUrl}, 'SIDE', #{clubType}, 'side_result.mp4', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

SELECT SEQ_SWING_ANALYSIS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SWING_ANALYSIS ( ANALYSIS_ID, VIDEO_ID, SIDE_VIDEO_ID, USER_ID, CLUB_TYPE, BODY_CODE, ARM_LENGTH_TYPE, HAND_TYPE, TOTAL_SCORE, X_FACTOR, ANALYSIS_STATUS, UPDATED_AT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{analysisId}, #{frontVideoId}, #{sideVideoId}, #{userId}, #{clubType}, #{bodyCode}, #{armLengthType}, #{handType}, #{totalScore}, #{xFactor}, 'DONE', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO SWING_SECTION_SCORE ( SECTION_SCORE_ID, ANALYSIS_ID, SECTION_NAME, SPINE_ANGLE, KNEE_ANGLE, SHOULDER_ROTATION, PELVIS_ROTATION, ARM_POSITION_SCORE, SHOULDER_DEVIATION_RATIO, SECTION_SCORE ) VALUES ( SEQ_SWING_SECTION_SCORE.NEXTVAL, #{analysisId}, #{sectionName}, #{spineAngle}, #{kneeAngle}, #{shoulderRotation}, #{pelvisRotation}, #{armPositionScore}, #{shoulderDeviationRatio}, #{sectionScore} )

INSERT INTO FEEDBACK ( FEEDBACK_ID, ANALYSIS_ID, SECTION_NAME, PROBLEM_TYPE, FEEDBACK_TEXT, CORRECTION_GUIDE, MEASURED_VALUE, LIMIT_VALUE, UPDATED_AT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_FEEDBACK.NEXTVAL, #{analysisId}, #{sectionName}, #{problemType}, #{feedbackText}, #{correctionGuide}, #{measuredValue}, #{limitValue}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT A.ANALYSIS_ID AS analysisId, A.USER_ID AS userId, A.CLUB_TYPE AS clubType, A.TOTAL_SCORE AS totalScore, A.X_FACTOR AS xFactor, A.ANALYSIS_STATUS AS analysisStatus, TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt FROM SWING_ANALYSIS A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT A.ANALYSIS_ID AS analysisId, A.VIDEO_ID AS frontVideoId, A.SIDE_VIDEO_ID AS sideVideoId, A.USER_ID AS userId, A.CLUB_TYPE AS clubType, A.BODY_CODE AS bodyCode, A.ARM_LENGTH_TYPE AS armLengthType, A.HAND_TYPE AS handType, A.TOTAL_SCORE AS totalScore, A.X_FACTOR AS xFactor, FV.VIDEO_URL AS frontVideoUrl, SV.VIDEO_URL AS sideVideoUrl, TO_CHAR(A.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt FROM SWING_ANALYSIS A LEFT JOIN SWING_VIDEO FV ON A.VIDEO_ID = FV.VIDEO_ID LEFT JOIN SWING_VIDEO SV ON A.SIDE_VIDEO_ID = SV.VIDEO_ID WHERE A.ANALYSIS_ID = #{analysisId}

SELECT SECTION_NAME AS sectionName, SPINE_ANGLE AS spineAngle, KNEE_ANGLE AS kneeAngle, SHOULDER_ROTATION AS shoulderRotation, PELVIS_ROTATION AS pelvisRotation, ARM_POSITION_SCORE AS armPositionScore, SHOULDER_DEVIATION_RATIO AS shoulderDeviationRatio, SECTION_SCORE AS sectionScore FROM SWING_SECTION_SCORE WHERE ANALYSIS_ID = #{analysisId} ORDER BY SECTION_SCORE_ID ASC
SELECT FEEDBACK_TEXT FROM FEEDBACK WHERE ANALYSIS_ID = #{analysisId} ORDER BY FEEDBACK_ID ASC
